title: Manage plant cultural practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage plant cultural practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define the plant cultural requirements of the site

pcs.text: Survey and record the range of plant life areas and plant species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Survey and record the range of plant life areas and plant species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Survey and record the range of plant life areas and plant species.

pcs.text: Determine personnel and resources required for implementation and maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine personnel and resources required for implementation and maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine personnel and resources required for implementation and maintenance.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with work activities, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Assess staff capability, skills and knowledge against implementation and maintenance requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess staff capability, skills and knowledge against implementation and maintenance requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess staff capability, skills and knowledge against implementation and maintenance requirements.

pcs.text: Implement staff training and development as required to bridge gaps
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement staff training and development as required to bridge gaps?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement staff training and development as required to bridge gaps.

elements.title: Develop a plant cultural program for the site

pcs.text: Determine plant cultural practices over the duration of a documented planning period

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine plant cultural practices over the duration of a documented planning period.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate resources and develop budgets for the implementation period.

pcs.text: Source and contract required specialist cultural practice services

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and contract required specialist cultural practice services.

pcs.text: Develop a schedule of operations for the implementation period
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a schedule of operations for the implementation period?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a schedule of operations for the implementation period.

pcs.text: Allow for environmental and cultural contingencies in the site program according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allow for environmental and cultural contingencies in the site program according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allow for environmental and cultural contingencies in the site program according to environmental and biosecurity legislation, regulations and workplace procedures.
